subject: Monthly Settlement Report - February 2025
body:
Dear Partner,

Please find attached the monthly settlement report for February 2025.

Supplier: Gulf Air (GF)
Settlement Period: Feb 1 - Feb 28, 2025
Total Bookings: 156
Total Amount: KWD 45,850.00
Commissions Earned: KWD 4,585.00
Payment Due: March 15, 2025

Breakdown:
- Business Class: 45 pax, KWD 28,500.00
- Economy Class: 111 pax, KWD 17,350.00

Refer to attached Excel file for detailed transaction list.

Please confirm receipt.

Regards,
Settlements Team
Gulf Air
